_comment: Regression baseline for the main-merge no-regressions gate. Consumed by seqtoid-ssot-infra/platform-harness bin/regression-compare.sh (wired into ci-test-mysql8.yml). Monotonic-up metrics FAIL the gate if they drop below these floors (coverage tol 0.5pp, example counts have NO tolerance); rspec/jest failure counts must be 0 (enforced from the live run, not this file). Counts are null until the first blessed run fills them (null = skipped, not failed). RE-BLESS after an intentional change: do NOT use platform-harness/capture-baseline.sh -- it emits the multi-repo baseline/main-baseline.json schema, not this single-repo file, and its --run-app path measures an UNSHARDED local suite whose coverage number is not the collated number this gate re-measures. Instead read the numbers off the 'Collate coverage + regression gate' job of a green integration->main run: SimpleCov prints 'Line Coverage: X%' (-> app.coverage.line) and the aggregated 'N examples, 0 failures' (-> app.rspec.examples). Only bless a run that collated all 4 shards.
captured_at: 2026-07-17 (collate job of green integration->main promotion run 29570461820, head 2cfeb19d5: 4/4 shards collated, 3704 examples, 0 failures, Line Coverage 90.93% (15086/16590), Branch Coverage 75.88% (3888/5124))
